🚨 Critical - vm2 Sandbox Escape → Remote Code Execution (CVE-2026-45411)  A sandbox escape in vm2 lets attacker-supplied code break out of the VM2 isolation and execute arbitrary commands on the host. The flaw abuses async generator behavior — when a generator closes via return, exceptions thrown during promise resolution can be caught and pivoted to host resources, bypassing every isolation guarantee vm2 advertises (CVSS 9.8, no auth, no UI).  👉 Affected: vm2 (npm) ≤ 3.11.2 | Upgrade to 3.11.3 — or migrate to isolated-vm (vm2 is deprecated)

【Microsoft 5月更新、138件修正・DNS RCEに注意】  Microsoftは2026年5月のPatch Tuesdayで138件の脆弱性を修正しました。 30件がCriticalで、特にWindows DNSのCVE-2026-41096は、細工したDNS応答により未認証でコード実行につながる可能性があります。  現時点で実悪用中とはされていませんが、DNSや認証系は攻撃後の影響範囲が大きい領域です。 ドメイン参加端末、サーバー、DNS通信の異常、パッチ適用状況を優先確認してください。  #Microsoft #PatchTuesday #Windows #DNS #CVE #脆弱性 thehackernews.com/2026/05/mi…

【F5がBIG-IP・BIG-IQ・NGINXの50件超を修正】  F5は2026年5月の四半期更新で、BIG-IP、BIG-IQ、NGINXに影響する高・中深刻度の脆弱性を多数修正しました。 最重要はNGINXのCVE-2026-42945で、未認証HTTPリクエストによりDoS、条件次第でコード実行の可能性があります。  BIG-IPではiControl RESTや認証後RCE/コマンドインジェクションも含まれます。 管理面・制御面にアクセスできるユーザーやネットワーク範囲を再確認してください。  #F5 #BIGIP #NGINX #CVE #脆弱性 #PatchManagement securityweek.com/f5-patches-…

【Linux Fragnesia、PoC公開済みのroot権限昇格】  Linux kernelのCVE-2026-46300、通称Fragnesiaの詳細が公開されました。 XFRM ESP-in-TCP subsystemの問題により、未特権ローカル攻撃者がページキャッシュを破壊し、root権限を得る可能性があります。  PoCが公開されているため、マルチユーザー環境、コンテナホスト、公開サービス侵害後の二段階攻撃に注意が必要です。 パッチ適用に加え、esp4/esp6や不要なIPsec/XFRM機能の利用状況を確認してください。  #Linux #Kernel #CVE #PrivilegeEscalation #脆弱性 #PoC thehackernews.com/2026/05/ne…

【PraisonAI脆弱性、公開から数時間で探索対象に】  PraisonAIのCVE-2026-44338は、認証が無効なレガシーFlask APIにより、外部から`/agents`や`/chat`へアクセスできる問題です。 公開後3時間44分で、該当エンドポイントを狙う探索が観測されました。  AIエージェント基盤は、内部ワークフローや認証情報と接続されていることが多く、単なる検証環境でも放置は危険です。 外部公開、認証設定、APIログ、`.env`アクセスを確認してください。  #PraisonAI #AIセキュリティ #CVE #脆弱性 #AppSec #CloudSecurity securityweek.com/hackers-tar…

【NATSをC2に使う新手法、Langflow悪用でクラウドキー窃取】  Sysdigは、攻撃者がNATSをC2として利用し、AWSキーやAI APIキーを窃取する活動を報告しました。 LangflowのCVE-2026-33017悪用と関連しており、AIワークフロー基盤がクラウド侵害の入口になるリスクが浮き彫りになっています。  AI基盤を外部公開している環境では、パッチ適用だけでなく、環境変数、`.env`、APIキー、クラウド権限の監査が必要です。 NATS通信が業務で想定されるかも確認してください。  #Langflow #NATS #CloudSecurity #AIセキュリティ #AWS #CVE #C2 sysdig.com/blog/nats-as-c2-i…

【PAN-OSのUser-ID認証ポータル脆弱性、攻撃確認】  PAN-OSのCVE-2026-0300は、User-ID Authentication Portalに存在する未認証RCE級のバッファオーバーフローです。 Palo Alto Networksの公式情報ではExploit MaturityがATTACKEDとされており、外部公開された認証ポータルは優先的に確認すべきです。  影響を受ける環境では、修正版適用、公開範囲の制限、不要なポータル無効化を検討してください。 ファイアウォールは境界防御の中核であり、侵害時の影響はネットワーク全体に及びます。  #PaloAltoNetworks #PANOS #CVE #Firewall #RCE #脆弱性 security.paloaltonetworks.co…

【NGINXに18年潜伏した未認証RCE級脆弱性】  NGINXのrewrite moduleにCVE-2026-42945が公表されました。 特定のrewrite構成を持つ環境では、攻撃者が細工したHTTPリクエストを送ることでNGINX workerのヒープ破壊を引き起こし、DoSや条件次第でコード実行につながる可能性があります。  リバースプロキシ、Ingress、WAF連携でNGINXを使う環境は影響範囲を確認してください。 即時更新できない場合は、rewrite directiveで無名キャプチャを使っていないか点検が必要です。  #NGINX #CVE #RCE #WebSecurity #脆弱性 #PatchManagement thehackernews.com/2026/05/18…

【Cisco SD-WAN認証バイパスが実悪用、CISA KEVに追加】  Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN ControllerのCVE-2026-20182が実悪用され、CISA KEVに追加されました。 未認証の攻撃者がSD-WAN制御面のピアとして振る舞い、NETCONF経由の操作や管理権限相当のアクセスにつながる可能性があります。  特にUDP/12346やTCP/830が外部から到達可能な環境は優先確認が必要です。 防御側は修正版適用に加え、vmanage-adminのログイン、未知IPからのピア接続、想定外のデバイスタイプを監視してください。  #Cisco #SDWAN #CVE #CISA #KEV #脆弱性 #NetworkSecurity thehackernews.com/2026/05/ci…

Polite AI ≠ Secure AI.  The PAN-OS CVE-2026-0265 authentication bypass claims highlight a growing enterprise reality: once attackers bypass identity controls on critical infrastructure, the real security challenge becomes governing what they are authorized to do across interconnected systems operating at machine speed.   The danger is no longer simply initial access — it’s the ability for compromised sessions, APIs, machine identities, and administrative pathways to move laterally inside trusted environments without continuous runtime authorization enforcement.   “Polite AI ≠ Secure AI. In the AI era, security cannot depend on one-time authentication events and static trust assumptions — it requires continuous runtime authorization enforcement capable of controlling actions after access is gained,” said Mark O. Rogge, Founder & CEO of EnforceAuth.   EnforceAuth was built to close the Authorization Gap with policy-based runtime enforcement, immutable audit trails, and continuous controls for AI agents, APIs, machine identities, and modern enterprise infrastructure.
“Now publish the CVE.”

Let’s ground this. “Implementation drift” isn’t a buzzword — it’s what happens when config files diverge from IaC templates, when container base images go unpatched for months, or when audit hooks are quietly disabled to “unblock prod.” MITRE ATT&CK shows over 60% of initial access vectors exploit misconfigurations or credential leakage — not zero-days. And supply-chain compromise? Look at SolarWinds, Codecov, or even PyPI typosquats. Attackers don’t brute-force microkernels; they slip in through dependency shadows and CI/CD blind spots. Fail-closed only works if every seam is *continuously* sealed — not just at launch.

sample_tweets.text: #threatreport #MediumCompleteness Dark Web Profile: Keymous+ | 13-05-2026 Source: socradar.io/blog/dark-web-pr… Key details below ↓  🧑‍💻Actors/Campaigns: Keymous (🧠motivation: hacktivism) Opisrael Ddos-for-hire (🧠motivation: hacktivism) Rippersec Mr_hamza Moroccan_dragons Noname057 Anonsec  💀Threats: Elitestress_tool, Dns_amplification_technique, Udpflood_technique, Icmpflood_technique, Megamedusa_tool, Mirai, Godzilla_webshell, Synflood_technique,  🎯Victims: Government, Telecommunications, Financial services, Transportation and logistics, Hospitality, Healthcare, Education, Energy, Africa, Asia, ...  🏭Industry: Healthcare, Education, Iot, Government, Energy, Military, Transport, Logistic, Telco, Entertainment, Financial  🌐Geo: Saudi arabia, Morocco, African, Saudi, France, Jordan, Chinese, Israel, Bangladesh, Iranian, Palestine, Palestinians, Israeli, Sweden, Sudan, Italy, Kuwait, Pakistan, Asia, Spain, Ukraine, Denmark, Belgium, United kingdom, Germany, Malaysian, Algeria, Netherlands, Africa, India  📚TTPs: ⚔️Tactics: 7 🛠️Technics: 11  💽Software: Telegram, egram chan, elegram ch, Discord  🗂️Win API: NetBIOS  💻Platforms: arm  #threatreport: Keymous+, also identified as Keymous Plus, is a North African hacktivist group recognized for its commercial DDoS-as-a-Service operations. Emerging in November 2023 with a DDoS attack on Morocco's e-Visa portal, the group is characterized as a blend of political activism and service provision. Significant geopolitical tensions between Algeria and Morocco, coupled with the Gaza conflict, have spurred the group's formation and operational focus.  Internally, Keymous+ distinguishes between its Alpha Team and Beta Team. The Alpha Team, historically responsible for data breaches and targeted attacks against government and financial sectors, has largely ceased activity as of late 2024, suggesting it may have been merged into or gone underground. In contrast, the Beta Team has become the primary operational force, managing all DDoS campaigns and showcasing attack successes on Check-Host.net through Telegram channels. The group has also formed strategic alliances with various other hacktivist collectives, amplifying its operational capacity.  Keymous+ utilizes the EliteStress platform, a commercial DDoS service that enables users to launch attacks with various techniques, including DNS amplification, UDP and TCP floods. These attacks can reach individual peak bandwidths of 11.8 Gbps, with collaborative operations surpassing 44 Gbps. Linked to a large pool of source IPs—including those from compromised devices, public cloud instances, and VPN services—these operations are designed to evade traditional IP-based defensive measures.  The group's targeting strategy is opportunistic, responding to geopolitical events rather than conducting prolonged reconnaissance. Keymous+ has focused its DDoS efforts on high-profile public-facing entities, primarily government agencies, and sectors like telecommunications, finance, and healthcare. This approach is indicative of a well-planned operational tempo that reflects the group’s commercial affiliations.  Organizations looking to defend against Keymous+ require robust strategies that go beyond traditional mitigation. This includes prioritizing vector-based detection over IP blocking, enhancing early warning systems via Telegram monitoring, adjusting operational security postures during heightened activity windows, and preparing for coalition-enhanced attack amplitudes. Targeted sectors, particularly within the geographies most affected by Keymous+, should maintain heightened vigilance against potential attacks. Additionally, the group’s connections to EliteStress underscore the necessity for organizations to strengthen defenses against commercial DDoS services that facilitate such attacks.  The group’s activities align with specific techniques noted in the MITRE ATT&CK framework, focusing on the T1498 network denial of service tactics which encompass a range of direct and amplification attack methodologies, highlighting an adaptive threat landscape.

sample_tweets.text: 사이버 정보 보안 강화🙏👍👍

AI가 만든 제로데이가 현실이 됐습니다. 그리고 그 표적에는 임베디드 디바이스가 있습니다.  지난 5월 11일, Google Threat Intelligence Group(GTIG)이 AI로 개발된 것으로 판단되는 제로데이 익스플로잇 첫 확정 사례를 공개했습니다. 보안 업계가 우려해온 시나리오의 첫 실증 증거입니다. 사이버 범죄 조직이 AI를 활용해 오픈소스 시스템 관리 도구의 2FA 우회 제로데이를 개발 Python 스크립트로 구현, 대규모 공격(mass exploitation)에 사용될 예정이었으나 GTIG가 사전 차단했습니다. Gemini도 Anthropic의 Mythos도 아닌 다른 AI 모델이 사용된 것으로 추정되지만, 특정 모델 차단으로 해결될 문제가 아닙니다. GTIG는 "빙산의 일각", "앞으로 더 많이 올 것" 이라고 명시했습니다.  Mandiant의 M-Trends 2026 보고서가 같은 시기에 공개한 수치가 더 충격적입니다. 2018년: 평균 취약점 악용까지 63일 2024년: -1일 2025년: -7일 음수입니다. 공격이 패치보다 평균 7일 먼저 시작된다는 의미입니다. "패치 나오면 빨리 적용하자" 라는 종래의 보안 모델이 통계적으로 작동하지 않게 됐습니다. EU CRA Article 14의 24시간 보고 시계는, 공격이actively exploited 상태가 되는 순간 작동합니다.  위 두 가지 사실을 합치면 결론은 분명합니다. 시그니처 기반 탐지만으로는 한계가 명확해지고 있고, AI가 동적으로 코드를 변형하면 시그니처는 매번 뒤늦게 따라갑니다. 또한, 패치 사이클이 공격 속도를 따라잡지 못합니다. TTE가 -7일이라는 건 "패치 + 적용" 으로 닫히지 않는 윈도우가 있다는 뜻입니다. 마지막으로, 공급망·빌드·인증 단계만으로는 부족합니다. 디바이스가 EU 시장에 머무는 동안 펌웨어 내부에서 행위 기반으로 실시간 탐지하는 계층이 필요한 이유입니다.  Peanut AI는IoT/OT 디바이스 내부에 직접 설치되는 3.7MB Rust 기반 Embedded Agent를 통해: Runtime 행위 기반 탐지 — 시그니처가 없는 zero-day까지 행위 패턴으로 식별. actively exploited 판단 근거를 자동 확보합니다. SBOM + HBOM 통합 식별 — 펌웨어가 어떤 컴포넌트로 구성됐는지 디바이스 내부에서 실시간 파악. 영향 범위를 즉시 산출합니다. 이미 출하된 레거시 장비 대응 — 동일한 Agent를 현장 기기에 적용. EU CRA Article 69(3) 소급 보고 의무까지 함께 해결합니다. 자체 OTA 시스템 — 새로운 위협이 식별되면 원격 패치를 일괄 배포. 패치 사이클을 디바이스 단까지 단축합니다.  AI가 만든 제로데이는 "올지도 모르는 위협" 이 아니라 "이미 와 있는 현실" 입니다.

🇯🇵 일본 3대 메가뱅크, 이달 말 Anthropic Mythos 접근 예정  오늘의 Passive 섹터 모멘텀 탭: 소프트웨어 IGV 1개월 강세. AI 사이버 보안 수요가 금융 섹터로 확산되는 구간. 📊 국내주식/미국주식 분석 사이트 👉 링크는 프로필에 있습니다  Reuters와 Bloomberg 보도에 따르면 MUFG, Mizuho, SMFG 일본 3대 메가뱅크가 이달 말까지 Anthropic의 Mythos 모델에 접근할 예정이다. 일본 기업이 Mythos에 접근하는 것은 이번이 처음이다.   이 결정은 스콧 베센트 미국 재무장관이 도쿄에서 일본 재무장관과 면담하는 자리에서 전달된 것으로 알려졌다. Mythos 접근권이 상업 채널이 아닌 미국 재무부 외교 채널을 통해 전달된 구조다.   Mythos가 무엇인지 맥락이 중요하다.  Mythos는 방어적 사이버 보안 목적으로 설계된 AI 모델이다. 내부 테스트에서 모든 주요 운영체제와 웹 브라우저에 걸쳐 수천 개의 미발견 취약점을 찾아냈고, Firefox는 단 한 번의 Mythos 평가 후 271개의 취약점을 패치했다. Anthropic은 이를 "사이버 위험의 순간"으로 규정하며 접근을 엄격히 통제하고 있다.   Anthropic의 Project Glasswing 프레임워크 아래 현재 AWS, Apple, Cisco, Google, JPMorganChase, Microsoft, Nvidia, Palo Alto Networks 등 12개 파트너와 약 40개 기관만이 접근권을 보유하고 있다.   이번 발표가 단순한 AI 서비스 확장이 아닌 이유가 있다.  유럽 국가들은 미국이 접근 파트너 확장을 차단하고 있다고 불만을 표명했고, 지난주 에코핀 회의에서 EU 재무장관들이 이를 공식 제기했다. 미국 재무부가 Mythos 접근권을 일본에 먼저 제공한 것은 기술 외교의 새로운 형태로 읽힌다.  일본 재무장관 카타야마는 Mythos 관련 사이버 리스크를 다루기 위한 36개 공공·민간 기관 합동 워킹그룹을 구성한다고 발표했다. 일본은행과 3대 메가뱅크, Anthropic·OpenAI 일본법인이 참여한다.   오늘의 Passive 시장 밸류 탭: S&P 500 PER 27.73배. sample_tweets.text: Hi @IndiGo6E ,  It has been several days since your response, but unfortunately I have still not received any proper update, resolution, apology, or follow-up regarding the incident.  This situation was caused during an exceptional circumstance after the Vikramshila Bridge collapse incident, which severely impacted connectivity from remote regions of Bihar. Despite such a major disruption, there was no travel advisory or passenger guidance shared from IndiGo’s official X/Twitter handle for affected travelers.  Additionally, I did not receive any follow-up calls or assistance from the local airport staff before departure, even after explaining the emergency situation in detail. What disappointed me further was the completely insensitive and unprofessional behavior experienced at Purnea Airport.  I have travelled from cities like Bangalore and Hyderabad multiple times, and the IndiGo staff there are usually polite, supportive, and actively coordinate with passengers — even making boarding follow-up calls when required. Unfortunately, my experience at Purnea Airport was entirely opposite, which raises serious concerns about the level of passenger handling and accountability there.  I request IndiGo to: • Provide an official update on my case • Clarify why no travel advisory was issued despite such a major regional disruption • Review the behavior and conduct of the concerned staff • Explain why no reasonable exception or assistance was considered in a natural disaster-like situation  Passengers travelling from smaller cities and rural regions also deserve empathy, professionalism, and equal treatment.  Awaiting a meaningful response and resolution.

Information technology led sector performance, while the Russell 2000 (IWM) also advanced and materials underperformed on rotation and commodity pressures. Investors viewed the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing positively as a de-escalation signal for US-China relations, despite the lack of an immediate trade deal. US retail sales and jobless claims pointed to resilient consumer spending in April despite higher gas prices, but the data generated limited market reaction. After-hours trading was quiet with no major earnings-driven moves and index futures holding little changed. Traders are set to watch follow-through on AI momentum, any updates from US-China talks, US industrial production, the New York Fed manufacturing index, and the next wave of earnings on Friday.

there's a mantra "no perfect security" that's almost an article of faith in the cybersecurity community  you might find a counterexample under extreme conditions but  in 1790, british locksmiths claimed they had perfected lockmaking and offered 200 guineas to anyone who could pick a Bramah challenge lock. It sat there for 67 years, unpicked, and became a symbol of British engineering supremacy.  then at the 1851 Great Exhibition in London, an American named Hobbs took up the challenge. working in a sealed room under observers, he picked the bramah lock. in the same year, he also picked the chubb "detector" lock, another British design thought to be unpickable  this was called the Great Lock Controversy, and it shattered Victorian confidence in the perfection of British industry and in unbreakable physical security  however secure you make the box there's always a great lockpicker sizing you up

🚨 AIM Smarter Allegedly Suffers Data Breach Exposing Business and Internal Login Records  A threat actor identified as “Shinigami” has claimed responsibility for a data breach allegedly affecting AIM Smarter. According to the underground forum post, the incident occurred around May 11, 2026, and reportedly exposed more than 6,500 rows of structured business and operational data.  The leaked information allegedly includes a broad range of corporate, financial, and internal system records, such as:  - Customer and company names - Internal reference numbers and short codes - Trading addresses and postal codes - Phone numbers, fax numbers, and email addresses - Website URLs - Credit limits and payment-related information - VAT registration numbers - SIC codes, DUNS numbers, and company registration details - Employee counts and industry classifications - Operational records including account opening/amendment dates - Legacy system identifiers and division/source codes  The actor also claims the dataset contains internal employee login information, including staff email addresses, names, and MD5 password hashes.  According to the post, the allegedly affected entities include organizations across financial services, insurance, energy, and media sectors, with references to institutions such as Bank of Scotland, HBOS, and Halifax appearing within the dataset.  If authentic, the exposed information could facilitate targeted phishing, business email compromise (BEC), credential attacks, and fraud operations against both employees and partner organizations.  At the time of reporting, the authenticity and full scope of the alleged breach remain unverified.  #DataBreach #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

According to the listing, the exploit allegedly affects multiple major Linux distributions, including:  - RHEL 10 - CentOS Stream 10 - Rocky Linux 10 - AlmaLinux 10 - Ubuntu 22.04 / 24.04 / 25.04 - Debian 13 - Fedora 41 / 42 - openSUSE Tumbleweed - Arch Linux rolling releases  The threat actor claims the vulnerability is TOCTOU-based (Time-of-Check Time-of-Use), capable of stable local privilege escalation without causing system crashes, and leverages a shared object (.so) payload dropped into the /tmp directory.  #Linux #Exploit #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence #CTI #Malware #GitHubAbuse #TeamPCP #ShaiHulud

llm_summary:
🤖 [GEMINI 분석] 2026-05-15 07:58 KST
🔴 위협 점수: 9/10 (심각)

### 1. 현재 주요 사이버보안 트렌드
최근 사이버 위협 환경은 AI 모델을 활용한 취약점 탐색 및 공격 자동화가 고도화되는 추세이며, 특히 공급망 공격(Supply Chain Attack)이 오픈소스 패키지 저장소(npm, PyPI)를 중심으로 확산되고 있습니다. 기업의 핵심 인프라를 겨냥한 인증 우회(Auth Bypass) 및 원격 코드 실행(RCE) 취약점이 실무 환경에서 활발히 악용되고 있으며, 이에 따라 CISA 등 주요 기관은 긴급 패치 명령을 내리는 등 대응 수위를 높이고 있습니다. 또한, 랜섬웨어 그룹은 데이터 암호화에서 데이터 탈취 및 유출 협박(Extortion) 위주로 전술을 전환하며 기업의 운영 연속성을 심각하게 위협하고 있습니다.

### 2. 주요 위협 행위자 / 캠페인
*   **FrostyNeighbor (DarkReading):** 폴란드 및 우크라이나 정부 기관을 대상으로 정교한 피싱 페이로드를 배포하는 벨라루스 국가 배후 위협 그룹.
*   **TeamPCP (BleepingComputer):** Mistral AI의 소스 코드를 탈취하여 판매하겠다고 협박하는 해킹 그룹.
*   **Nitrogen (CyberScoop):** Foxconn 북미 공장을 공격하여 8TB 규모의 데이터를 탈취한 랜섬웨어 그룹.
*   **Kimsuky (Securelist):** PebbleDash 기반 툴을 사용하여 AppleSeed 악성코드 클러스터와 연계된 캠페인을 수행하는 위협 행위자.
*   **The Gentlemen (Check Point Research):** 2025년 중반 등장한 신규 RaaS(Ransomware-as-a-Service) 운영 그룹.

### 3. 한국 관련 위협
*   **국세청/금융기관 사칭 피싱:** 이스트시큐리티(ESRC)에 따르면, PhaaS(Phishing-as-a-Service)를 활용해 국내 기업을 타겟으로 한 국세청 전자세금계산서 및 하나은행 보안메일 사칭 피싱 공격이 포착됨.
*   **공급망 공격:** 샤이훌루드(Shai-Hulud) 공격자가 npm 및 PyPI 저장소의 정상 패키지를 위장하여 국내외 개발 환경을 공격 중.
*   **의료 장비 제조사 데이터 유출:** 안랩 ASEC 보고서에 따르면, 국내 의료 초음파 장비 제조 기업이 데이터 유출 피해를 입은 것으로 확인됨.

### 4. 주요 CVE / 취약점
*   **CVE-2026-20182:** Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller, Critical(CVSS 10.0), **Active Exploitation(실제 악용 중)**.
*   **CVE-2026-46300:** Linux Kernel (Fragnesia), High/Critical, PoC 공개로 인한 즉각적 위험.
*   **CVE-2026-0300:** PAN-OS User-ID Authentication Portal, Critical, **Active Exploitation(실제 악용 중)**.
*   **CVE-2026-42945:** NGINX rewrite module, High, 원격 코드 실행 가능.
*   **CVE-2025-68670:** xrdp server, High, Pre-auth RCE.

### 5. IOC 요약
*   **CVE:**
    *   CVE-2026-20182 ([TheHackerNews](https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/cisco-catalyst-sd-wan-controller-auth.html))
    *   CVE-2026-46300 ([SecurityWeek](https://www.securityweek.com/new-linux-kernel-vulnerability-fragnesia-allows-root-privilege-escalation/))
    *   CVE-2026-0300 ([Unit42](https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/captive-portal-zero-day/))
    *   CVE-2026-31431 ([Unit42](https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/cve-2026-31431-copy-fail/))
    *   CVE-2025-68670 ([Securelist](https://securelist.com/cve-2025-68670/119742/))

### 6. 즉각 대응 권고
*   **Cisco SD-WAN 패치:** CVE-2026-20182에 대한 벤더 보안 업데이트를 즉시 적용하고, 외부 노출된 관리 포트(UDP/12346, TCP/830)의 접근 제어를 강화하십시오.
*   **PAN-OS 점검:** CVE-2026-0300 취약점 노출 여부를 확인하고, Palo Alto Networks의 최신 보안 권고에 따라 Captive Portal 설정을 검토하십시오.
*   **개발 환경 보안:** 오픈소스 패키지(npm, PyPI) 사용 시 출처를 재검증하고, 보안 도구(Checkmarx 등)의 무결성을 확인하여 공급망 공격 피해를 예방하십시오.

### 7. 위협 수준 평가
*   **점수:** 9/10
*   **근거:** Cisco SD-WAN 및 PAN-OS 등 핵심 네트워크 인프라 취약점이 실무 환경에서 활발히 악용되고 있으며, 공급망 공격이 개발자 생태계를 직접 타격하고 있어 매우 높은 수준의 경계가 필요함.
